title: Add and display tasks
summary: Users can type a task and press Enter or click Add to create it. Tasks appear in a list below the input. Empty or whitespace-only input is rejected.
details: Added client component with useState for tasks and input, useRef for unique ID generation
Form-based input with text field and Add button — Enter and click both submit via onSubmit
Task list rendered as ul with unique keys, empty state message when no tasks exist
Styled with Tailwind: centered layout, input with focus ring, blue button, bordered list items
